progress_update.summary: We completed the full planning cycle for the Podcast Summary skill — scope, research, and comprehensive implementation plan + task breakdown. The skill monitors RSS feeds, acquires transcripts via scraping or local Whisper, generates adaptive LLM summaries, delivers nightly email digests, ingests health newsletters from Gmail (auto-trashed after processing), and maintains a persistent health knowledge store. 26 requirements traced across 4 phases, 21 parent tasks, 42 sub-tasks. Ready to execute.
progress_update.goal: Build a podcast-summary skill for the IronClaw/OpenClaw agent. Success: Jeff wakes up daily to an email digest of new podcast episode summaries, health content persists to a queryable knowledge store, and on-demand summaries are available via Telegram/iMessage.
accomplished: Scoped the full feature via /spectre:scope — 26 requirements confirmed, IN/OUT boundaries locked

Dispatched @finder + @web-research agents — discovered audio_bridge_service.py as Whisper bridge pattern, confirmed whisper.cpp ships whisper-server binary, found Tim Ferriss has free public transcripts, Huberman on podscript.ai, Attia needs Whisper fallback
Wrote comprehensive task_context.md covering vault pattern, transcript strategy per show, Gmail IMAP stdlib approach, whisper.cpp API details
Authored full implementation plan (specs/plan.md) — 4-phase architecture with host-side batch engine, always-on Whisper LaunchAgent, OpenClaw cron for 6AM notification
Generated complete task breakdown (specs/tasks.md) — 4 phases, 21 parents, 42 sub-tasks, 9 parallel execution waves, 100% requirement coverage
progress_update.now: Planning complete. All artifacts saved. Next action is /spectre:execute in a fresh context window to begin Phase 1 implementation.
next_steps: Run /spectre:execute to start Phase 1 (Core Infrastructure) — Whisper bridge build, vault structure, OPML importer, RSS poller, skill scaffold, engine dry-run, crontab setup
Phase 1 has no emails — just infrastructure and dry-run validation
Phase 2 (Transcript Pipeline + Email Digest) is when emails first flow — requires Whisper bridge to be live
After Phase 2 ships, run /spectre:handoff again before starting Phase 3 (Health Store + Newsletters)
constraints: No jq in Docker container — all JSON via python3 stdlib
Available bins: bash, python3, node, curl, openssl only
No emails until Phase 2 complete (Whisper bridge live) — quality bar decision
whisper-server single mutex — episodes processed sequentially, not in parallel
Batch engine.py runs on Mac host (system crontab), not inside container — avoids turn timeout
openclaw.json schema is fixed — never add custom keys; all config in skill files
decisions: Whisper model routing: large-v3 for Attia/Huberman/Rhonda Patrick, small.en for all others — per-show override via feeds.json whisper_model field
Health store: JSON file (not SQLite) — ~500 entries/year, LLM-based future queries fit context window approach
Newsletter processing: Gmail IMAP + health-newsletters label → summarize → store → move to Gmail Trash (recoverable 30 days)
open_questions: HappyScribe scraping for Attia transcripts may return 403 — needs live test early in Phase 2 to determine if Whisper-only for Attia
Attia/FoundMyFitness member site login for full newsletter content — Playwright may be needed if JS-heavy
risks: HappyScribe bot protection on Attia transcripts (403) — Whisper fallback is reliable, so low business risk but affects summary quality
Overnight window capacity: ~40 episode max at ~10min/episode — typical nights are 2-5 new episodes so comfortable headroom
whisper-server /load endpoint for model switching — needs validation that it works reliably before relying on it in production
